parameters.subject: Your Insurance Quote Request - Buckalew Financial
parameters.html:
Thank You for Your Quote Request

Hi {{$json.first_name}},

Thank you for requesting a quote for {{$json.coverage_type}}.

Based on the information you provided:

  • Coverage Type: {{$json.coverage_type}}
  • State: {{$json.state}}
  • Estimated Range: ${{$json.estimatedMonthly}}/month

Please note: This is a rough estimate. Your actual quote may vary based on final underwriting.

A licensed agent will review your request and contact you within 24 hours.

Questions? Book a call here →

To your health,
Larry Buckalew
Buckalew Financial Services
License: W248767

parameters.name: text

parameters.subject: Unfortunately, we're not licensed in {{$json.state}} yet
parameters.html:
Quote Request Received

Hi {{$json.first_name}},

Thank you for your interest in Buckalew Financial Services.

Unfortunately, we are not yet licensed to provide insurance in {{$json.state}}.

We are expanding! Enter your email below and we'll notify you when we become licensed in your state.

We're currently licensed in: Florida, Texas, California, North Carolina, South Carolina, and Michigan.

Thank you for your understanding.

Warm regards,
Larry Buckalew
Buckalew Financial Services
